name: TWFG, Inc.
business: We are a leading, high-growth, independent distribution platform for personal and commercial insurance in the U.S. We operate through two primary offerings: Insurance Services (Agency-in-a-Box and Corporate Branches) and TWFG MGA. Our offerings include all lines of insurance, multiple distribution contract options, M&A services, proprietary virtual assistants, proprietary technology, and proprietary premium financing.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading, high-growth, independent distribution platform for personal and commercial insurance in the U.S.

catalysts.event: Share repurchase program authorized up to $50 million
catalysts.sentence: On February 23, 2026, our Board approved a share repurchase program that authorizes the Company to repurchase up to $50 million of its outstanding Class A common stock.

tamClaims.claim: Total P&C addressable market for Total Written Premium in the U.S. was approximately $1,050 billion as of 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: As a P&C distribution company, our total P&C addressable market for Total Written Premium in the U.S. was approximately $1,050 billion as of 2025, according to S&P Global Market Intelligence.
